name: artificer
purpose: Build working code, scripts, or configuration from a spec — complete artifact, not pseudocode or skeleton

task_description.description: The specification: what to build, language/format, constraints, acceptance criteria

injected_context.description: Reference material: existing code, API docs, schemas, examples to build from

output.description: The complete artifact (code, script, config) followed by a brief note on assumptions and dependencies

input.task_description: Write a bash one-liner that counts the number of lines in all .sh files in the current directory
